TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Kinulane ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Butay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 53 buwan, 209 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 201 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 8 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Rukay 93%, Paywan 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kinulane hya' ga Labuwan. tay mkyahu' na Kinulane hya' ga Adiri. tay 'zil na Kinulane hya' ga Wutai. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kinulane ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu βutaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, rukaj **%, pajwan *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na kinulane ħjaʔ ɣa laβuwan. taj mkjaħuʔ na kinulane ħjaʔ ɣa a*iri. taj ʔzil na kinulane ħjaʔ ɣa wutai. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Kinulane ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Butay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 53 buwan, 209 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 201 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 8 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Rukay 93%, Paywan 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Kinulane hya' ga Labuwan. tay mkyahu' na Kinulane hya' ga Adiri. tay 'zil na Kinulane hya' ga Wutai. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kinulane ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu βutaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, rukaj **%, pajwan *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na kinulane ħjaʔ ɣa laβuwan. taj mkjaħuʔ na kinulane ħjaʔ ɣa a*iri. taj ʔzil na kinulane ħjaʔ ɣa wutai. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
